title: Done = committed + pushed + verified on origin before any 'shipped' claim
detail: Predecessor session reported the self-improvement loop as shipped+verified, but nothing was committed: the branch equaled main and zero artifacts existed on disk. Rule: never report work as done/shipped/verified until 'git log origin/<branch>' confirms it.
note: Approved by Ryan (continue directive). Direct lesson of this session.

title: Deploy durable artifacts off ephemeral containers before claiming persistence
detail: Remote web containers are reclaimed; on-disk work there is not durable. Any live system (hooks, skills, modules) must be committed/pushed or installed on the real box before being treated as active.

title: session-guard heartbeat subcommand (fix >45m stale-lock gap)
detail: A session active longer than the TTL looked stale to others and could be taken over. Added 'heartbeat' to refresh the lock timestamp.

title: Add .gitignore for local/runtime files
detail: Repo had no .gitignore; .claude/settings.local.json and scheduled_tasks.lock were committable. Scoped ignores added.

title: Adopt SOUL/VOICE/AUDIENCE/DESIGN as standing layer-1 identity pattern; define scaffold-to-runtime promotion
detail: This branch adds EVERPASS/DESIGN.md and wires CLAUDE.md $11 to route four layer-1 identity files (SOUL/VOICE/AUDIENCE/DESIGN). Two things worth a standing decision: (1) whether this four-file pattern should be the permanent convention for any future EverPass identity/brand work, extended verbatim rather than re-derived each time; (2) confirmed real gap while doing this work -- the live runtime tree at 'C:\Users\ryan\OneDrive - EverPass Media\EVERPASS\CLAUDE.md' line 86 still has the pre-Task-1 $11 (no SOUL/VOICE/AUDIENCE/DESIGN, no layer-1 routing table) even though this repo (the scaffold, per OPERATOR-NOTES.md) is now ahead on branch claude/video-summary-fable-handoff-039c5h. OPERATOR-NOTES.md frames the repo as scaffold and OneDrive as runtime but documents no promotion process between them. HIGH because it touches the source-of-truth model ($3) and a live, in-use config file Ryan works from daily -- needs his call on whether/how to promote, not an autonomous copy.
note: Approved by Ryan 2026-07-06. Four-file pattern (SOUL/VOICE/AUDIENCE/DESIGN) is the standing layer-1 convention. Promotion process to runtime CLAUDE.md to be proposed as a doc in this repo, applied only on Ryan's explicit go.
